_description: Example product rotation config for a DTC supplement brand.

products.name: Appetite Control Pro
education_angles: Managing hunger during a cut without willpower alone
Why appetite increases during dieting and what actually helps
The difference between hunger and cravings during prep

products.name: Meal Ready
products.tagline: Real food nutrition when you can't sit down for a meal
education_angles: Why meal prep fails and what to do when it does
Hitting macros on busy days without resorting to junk
The difference between a protein bar and actual food-based nutrition

products.name: Metabolic Ignite
products.tagline: Metabolic support that actually has a mechanism of action
education_angles: What fat burners actually do (and don't do) for your physique
When to add a fat burner during a cut and when it's a waste
Thermogenics vs metabolic support: understanding the difference

products.name: Night Recovery
products.tagline: Wind down after training so recovery actually happens
education_angles: Why sleep is the most underrated recovery tool
The connection between training intensity and sleep quality
What to do when your CNS is fried but you still can't sleep

products.name: Complete Protein
products.tagline: Multi-source protein for sustained amino acid delivery
education_angles: Why protein source matters — not all servings are created equal
Time-release protein explained: sequential absorption vs single spike
Getting enough protein without living on chicken and rice

products.name: Basic Creatine
products.tagline: Creatine monohydrate — the most researched supplement there is
education_angles: Why creatine is the most evidence-based supplement and what it actually does
